phases.name: Vivify the prompt-workshop via pi-workflows
phases.intent: Run the 14 prompt-specs as a resumable, parser-gated pi-workflow over the .workshopping substrate to a promotion-ready whole-plan draft — closes DISC-26 and advances the DEC-29 orchestration trio (US-LLM-23/24/25). Data layer (.workshopping) done + 14/14 parity-proven; execution + runner layers unbuilt.
